plugin.name: zoom
plugin._long: A plugin to zoom in the desktop with the mouse or keyboard, and with IPC support.

option.name: modifier
option._short: Zoom in the desktop by scrolling with modifier
option._long: Scrolls with the specified modifier to zoom in and out.

option.name: zoom_in
option._long: Zoom in with the specified keybinding.

option.name: zoom_out
option._long: Zoom out with the specified keybinding.

option.name: zoom_reset
option._long: Reset zoom to 100% with the specified keybinding.

option.name: speed
option._long: Sets the speed factor for zooming.

option.name: smoothing_duration
option._long: Sets the smoothing duration in milliseconds.

option.name: interpolation_method
option._long: Sets the pixel interpolation method to use.

group._long: Methods available via the IPC interface for programmatic control.

method.name: zoom/setZoom
method._long: Sets the zoom factor to a specific value.
method.param: Whether to animate the transition (default: true)
